scripts.ingest:kbo:schedule: tsx scripts/ingest/fetch-kbo-source.ts schedule-calendar && tsx scripts/ingest/normalize-kbo-source.ts schedule-calendar
scripts.ingest:kbo:scoreboard: tsx scripts/ingest/fetch-kbo-source.ts scoreboard && tsx scripts/ingest/normalize-kbo-source.ts scoreboard
scripts.ingest:kbo:standings: tsx scripts/ingest/fetch-kbo-source.ts standings && tsx scripts/ingest/normalize-kbo-source.ts standings
scripts.ingest:kbo:team-stats: tsx scripts/ingest/fetch-kbo-source.ts team-hitter && tsx scripts/ingest/normalize-kbo-source.ts team-hitter && tsx scripts/ingest/fetch-kbo-source.ts team-pitcher && tsx scripts/ingest/normalize-kbo-source.ts team-pitcher
scripts.ingest:kbo:roster: ALLOW_FIXTURE_PUBLISH=true tsx scripts/ingest/fetch-kbo-source.ts roster-movement --fixture && ALLOW_FIXTURE_PUBLISH=true tsx scripts/ingest/normalize-kbo-source.ts roster-movement
scripts.ingest:kbo:history: tsx scripts/ingest/fetch-kbo-source.ts historical-team-record && tsx scripts/ingest/normalize-kbo-source.ts historical-team-record && tsx scripts/ingest/fetch-kbo-source.ts team-history && tsx scripts/ingest/normalize-kbo-source.ts team-history && tsx scripts/ingest/fetch-kbo-source.ts rules && tsx scripts/ingest/normalize-kbo-source.ts rules
